title: abies recurvata var. ernestii
intro: Abies recurvata var. ernestii, also known as Ernest's Fraser Fir, is a variety of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Abies recurvata var. ernestii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in dried forms for inhalation and topical application.
